channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Philippine cyclists and track athletes Krog, Wangkay, and Cesar qualify for Youth Olympic Games
item.description: Three young Filipino athletes are set to represent their country in the upcoming Youth Olympic Games, marking another step forward for Philippine sports on the international stage. Cyclist Maritanya K...

item.title: Campaign Highlights Experiences of Women Working in Nigeria’s Nightlife and Hospitality
item.description: Since the International Women’s Day, a campaign named Women in Nightlife (#WomenInNightlife) don dey shine light on the realities of women wey dey work for Nigeria nightlife and hospitality sector. Di...

item.title: CMHC report links Canada’s slower housing supply growth to higher home prices compared with the U.S.
item.description: A new report from the Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation (CMHC) concludes that Canadian housing prices would be about 10% lower and the national housing stock roughly 30% larger if the country’s ...

item.title: White House Prepares for Potential Disclosure of Extraterrestrial Life
item.description: The White House is reportedly preparing for the potential public disclosure of extraterrestrial life, a move that could have significant social, political, and religious repercussions. Recently releas...

item.title: Analyst warns Trump DOJ investigation into E. Jean Carroll may strengthen her legal case
item.description: President Donald Trump's Justice Department has launched a federal criminal investigation into the funding of E. Jean Carroll's legal defense, the journalist who successfully sued Trump for defamation...

item.title: MK Party chief whip released on bail amid allegations of salary extortion and fraud
item.description: Mmabatho Mokoena-Zondi, the chief whip of the uMkhonto weSizwe (MK) Party, has been released on R30 000 bail after appearing in the Cape Magistrate’s Court on fraud charges. The case has since been mo...

item.title: Amit Shah says voluntary return of illegal Bangladeshi immigrants will avoid legal action
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah, while addressing a public event in Gujarat’s Gandhinagar district, stated that illegal immigrants from Bangladesh residing in India would not face legal cases if they ch...

item.title: SNL UK writer defends controversial Zuckerberg joke, saying billionaire is “fair game”
item.description: Ania Magliano, a writer and co-host on the British edition of Saturday Night Live (SNL UK), has defended a controversial joke she made about Meta chief executive Mark Zuckerberg during the show’s firs...

item.title: UN to recognise Indian peacekeepers and Major Abhilasha Barak for their service
item.description: On the International Day of UN Peacekeepers, the United Nations will posthumously recognise two Indian soldiers, Lance Havildar Harbhajan Singh and Naib Subedar Sujit Kumar Pradhan, who sacrificed the...

item.title: Israeli forces strike Beirut suburb and south Lebanon amid fragile ceasefire with Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli strikes have hit southern Beirut for the second time since a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah took effect on 17 April. According to Lebanese authorities, an apartment south of Beirut was...

item.title: Australia Takes 3M to Court Over PFAS Contamination at Defence Sites
item.description: Australia is engaged in its largest-ever legal case, seeking $2 billion in damages from the US company 3M over the use of PFAS 'forever chemicals' at 28 Defence sites nationwide. PFAS are toxic synthe...

item.title: Murang’a County adopts Starlink satellite internet to support telemedicine services
item.description: Murang’a County in central Kenya has introduced a major digital health upgrade by using Starlink satellite internet, delivered through Paratus Essential Access, to support telemedicine services across...

item.title: Vincent Defends Stella Amid Linda’s Accusations in Episode 52 of The Alibi
item.description: Episode 52 of the ABS-CBN drama series The Alibi focuses on rising tensions between key characters Vincent, Stella, and Linda. In this instalment, Vincent steps in to defend Stella after she is confro...

item.title: CPPE warns that Nigeria’s GDP growth masks weak power supply, manufacturing and export competitiveness challenges
item.description: Nigeria recorded a real GDP growth of 3.89% year-on-year in Q1 2026, showing continued macroeconomic stability and resilience in some non-oil sectors. However, the Centre for the Promotion of Private ...

item.title: American climber Tyler Andrews sets new speed record on Mount Everest
item.description: American mountaineer Tyler Andrews has set a new record for the fastest ascent of Mount Everest, reaching the summit in just 9 hours and 55 minutes using supplementary oxygen. The previous record of 1...

item.title: Rivers-Based Film ‘The Boy Who Gave’ Premieres in Port Harcourt Highlighting Family Struggles
item.description: The film titled ‘The Boy Who Gave’ has premiered in Port Harcourt, Rivers State, drawing attention to the growing strength of the local creative and entertainment industry. The screening took place at...

item.title: Centre may engage armed forces for logistical support in NEET-UG re-exam on June 21
item.description: The Government of India is exploring the involvement of armed forces in the logistics of the NEET-UG re-examination scheduled for June 21, 2026, marking a first in the history of national entrance tes...

item.title: Net worth rankings of 90 Day Fiancé cast members reveal Bilal Hazziez as the richest
item.description: The article breaks down the estimated net worths of popular cast members from the TLC reality show 90 Day Fiancé and its spin-offs, highlighting how reality TV fame has translated into varying levels ...

item.title: Nigerian Telecoms Introduce Tools to Show Subscribers How Their Data Gets Used
item.description: Na so Nigerian telecom companies don decide to take action on how mobile data dey quickly finish for subscribers. Dem dey plan new transparency tools, including one data calculator wey go fit show peo...

item.title: NEMC Recognizes Tanzania Editors Forum for Environmental Journalism Contributions
item.description: The National Environment Management Council (NEMC) of Tanzania has officially recognised the Tanzania Editors Forum for its strong contribution to environmental conservation advocacy across the countr...
